violations.text: The loading dock doors are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

The following was observed: 1. Several fish/seafood items were observed held at 42-47 degrees Fahrenheit in the seafood cooler. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of items. 2. Cream cheese was observed held at 55 degrees Fahrenheit in the bakery cooler. Per PIC, foods were placed in the refrigeration unit 2 hours prior to inspection. Foods moved to refrigeration to rapidly cool. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Marinated raw poultry and beef were prepped and placed in the front deli case for sale. Prepped foods to be cooled down to 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below before being placed in the display/retail coolers. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Various fruits and garlic packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

The loading dock doors are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
The seafood cooler was observed in poor repair. The unit was observed maintaining temperatures between 41-45 New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was moved to warewashing are to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm) at the 3-bay sink in the deli area. A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024

The following was observed with an accumulation of dust and other debris: 1) The fans of the walk-in cooler in the deli and produce areas have an accumulation of dust. 2) The honeycomb grates of the produce retail coolers observed with an accumulation of dust and biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024

Prepared foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking ingredient lists. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
The can opener located in the deli area was not in good repair (rusted). New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2023

The vegetable fruit prep sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2023
